monthly.registerSubtitle: Join us in supporting the Dhamma School continuously.
monthly.title: Monthly Donors List
monthly.subtitle: With gratitude to everyone supporting the Gift of Dhamma.
monthly.empty: No donors recorded for this month yet.

hero.title: Welcome to
hero.subtitle: Discover the path to inner peace and wisdom through our authentic Buddhist teachings.

growth.label: Growth
growth.title: Elevate Your Soul
growth.description: Our teachings go beyond memory; we focus on the transformation of the heart. Experience a journey where ancient wisdom meets your personal growth path.

pure.label: Pure
pure.title: Original Wisdom
pure.description: Every lesson is anchored in the Tipitaka, ensuring you receive the Buddha's words in their purest most authentic form, undiluted by time.

sangha.label: Sangha
sangha.title: Circle of Dhamma
sangha.description: Build deep, meaningful connections with fellow practitioners and monastics worldwide. In our Sangha, every seeker finds a home.

dana.label: Dana
dana.title: The Power of Giving
dana.description: Dana is the foundation of merit. Your generosity fuels the free education of many, creating a legacy of wisdom for future generations.

cta.title: Support the
cta.subtitle: Your dana helps us provide free Buddhist education and maintain this online sanctuary. Help us keep the light of wisdom burning for all.

sponsorship.title: Sponsorship Opportunity
sponsorship.offer: You can become a sponsor for this auspicious event and earn great merits.

donate.title: Support our Mission

tiers.supporterText: Help us keep the servers running
tiers.patronText: Support one month of free education

donate.otherWaysDesc: We also accept donations via KBZPay, CB Bank, and specialized crypto wallets for global supporters.

impact.title: Your Impact
impact.mealsDesc: Supporting monks and students for a day.
impact.techDesc: Maintaining the servers for global outreach.

footer.quote: "The gift of Dhamma excels all gifts."

about.title: Wisdom &
about.description: Dedicated to spreading the authentic teachings of Buddha in the modern world through accessible education and community support.

history.title: Our History
history.text: The Dhamma School was founded with the vision of preserving the sacred teachings of Buddha and making them accessible to seekers of wisdom everywhere. Over the years, we have grown from a small local gathering into a global community of practitioners and scholars.

mission.title: Mission & Vision
mission.missionText: To provide high-quality Dhamma education that transforms hearts and minds, fostering peace, wisdom, and moral excellence.
mission.visionText: A world where the light of Dhamma shines in every heart, leading to a more compassionate and enlightened society.

contact.title: Connect
contact.subtitle: Have questions? We're here to help you on your Dhamma journey.

form.subject: Subject
